auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Foursquare Places API key used with the Authorization: fsq3 <api_key> header. Generate or revoke it from your project API Keys page: https://docs.foursquare.com/developer/docs/manage-api-keys

actions.name: get_nearby_places
actions.description: Retrieve nearby places around a latitude and longitude with Foursquare.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate in decimal degrees.

hacc.description: The horizontal accuracy radius in meters.

limit.description: The maximum number of nearby places to return.

items.description: One Foursquare field name to include in the response.

fields.description: The Foursquare response fields to request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Foursquare nearby place discovery.

chains.description: The chain metadata of the place.

dateClosed.description: The closure date of the place.

distance.description: The distance to the place in meters.

email.description: The primary contact email of the place.

fax.description: The fax number of the place.

features.description: The feature flags of the place.

display.description: The display string for the opening hours.

openNow.description: Whether the place is open right now.

regular.description: The regular opening-hour entries returned by Foursquare.

link.description: The Foursquare detail link of the place.

address.description: The street address of the place.

addressExtended.description: The extended address line of the place.

country.description: The country code or country name of the place.

crossStreet.description: The cross street of the place.

formattedAddress.description: The human-readable formatted address of the place.

locality.description: The locality or city of the place.

postcode.description: The postal code of the place.

region.description: The state or region of the place.

menu.description: The menu URL of the place.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the photo.

prefix.description: The URL prefix of the photo.

suffix.description: The URL suffix of the photo.

width.description: The maximum width of the photo.

height.description: The maximum height of the photo.

classifications.description: The photo classifications returned by Foursquare.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the tip.

lang.description: The language code of the tip.

url.description: The canonical URL of the tip.

agreeCount.description: The number of agreements on the tip.

disagreeCount.description: The number of disagreements on the tip.

popularity.description: The popularity score of the place.

price.description: The price tier of the place.

rating.description: The rating score of the place.

socialMedia.description: The social media metadata of the place.

tastes.description: The tastes associated with the place.

tel.description: The telephone number of the place.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the tip.

lang.description: The language code of the tip.

url.description: The canonical URL of the tip.

agreeCount.description: The number of agreements on the tip.

disagreeCount.description: The number of disagreements on the tip.

tips.description: The embedded tips of the place.

website.description: The website URL of the place.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Foursquare nearby places response.

actions.name: get_place
actions.description: Retrieve one place by Foursquare place ID.

items.description: One Foursquare field name to include in the response.

fields.description: The Foursquare response fields to request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Foursquare place.

chains.description: The chain metadata of the place.

dateClosed.description: The closure date of the place.

distance.description: The distance to the place in meters.

email.description: The primary contact email of the place.

fax.description: The fax number of the place.

features.description: The feature flags of the place.

display.description: The display string for the opening hours.

openNow.description: Whether the place is open right now.

regular.description: The regular opening-hour entries returned by Foursquare.

link.description: The Foursquare detail link of the place.

address.description: The street address of the place.

addressExtended.description: The extended address line of the place.

country.description: The country code or country name of the place.

crossStreet.description: The cross street of the place.

formattedAddress.description: The human-readable formatted address of the place.

locality.description: The locality or city of the place.

postcode.description: The postal code of the place.

region.description: The state or region of the place.

menu.description: The menu URL of the place.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the photo.

prefix.description: The URL prefix of the photo.

suffix.description: The URL suffix of the photo.

width.description: The maximum width of the photo.

height.description: The maximum height of the photo.

classifications.description: The photo classifications returned by Foursquare.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the tip.

lang.description: The language code of the tip.

url.description: The canonical URL of the tip.

agreeCount.description: The number of agreements on the tip.

disagreeCount.description: The number of disagreements on the tip.

popularity.description: The popularity score of the place.

price.description: The price tier of the place.

rating.description: The rating score of the place.

socialMedia.description: The social media metadata of the place.

tastes.description: The tastes associated with the place.

tel.description: The telephone number of the place.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the tip.

lang.description: The language code of the tip.

url.description: The canonical URL of the tip.

agreeCount.description: The number of agreements on the tip.

disagreeCount.description: The number of disagreements on the tip.

tips.description: The embedded tips of the place.

website.description: The website URL of the place.

actions.name: get_place_photos
actions.description: Retrieve photos for one Foursquare place.

sort.description: The ordering applied to photos or tips.

limit.description: The maximum number of photos to return.

classifications.description: The photo classifications used to filter the response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Foursquare place photos.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the photo.

prefix.description: The URL prefix of the photo.

suffix.description: The URL suffix of the photo.

width.description: The maximum width of the photo.

height.description: The maximum height of the photo.

classifications.description: The photo classifications returned by Foursquare.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the tip.

lang.description: The language code of the tip.

url.description: The canonical URL of the tip.

agreeCount.description: The number of agreements on the tip.

disagreeCount.description: The number of disagreements on the tip.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Foursquare place photos response.

actions.name: get_place_tips
actions.description: Retrieve tips for one Foursquare place.

sort.description: The ordering applied to photos or tips.

limit.description: The maximum number of tips to return.

items.description: One Foursquare field name to include in the response.

fields.description: The Foursquare response fields to request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Foursquare place tips.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the tip.

lang.description: The language code of the tip.

url.description: The canonical URL of the tip.

agreeCount.description: The number of agreements on the tip.

disagreeCount.description: The number of disagreements on the tip.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Foursquare place tips response.

actions.name: search_places
actions.description: Search for places with the Foursquare Places Search endpoint.

near.description: The locality text used for search biasing.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate in decimal degrees.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

items.description: One Foursquare field name to include in the response.

fields.description: The Foursquare response fields to request.

openNow.description: Whether to restrict results to places currently open.

openAt.description: The local day and time filter in `DOWTHHMM` format.

excludeAllChains.description: Whether to exclude all known chain places from the response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Foursquare place search.

radius.description: The radius of the search area in meters.

circle.description: The circle bounds of the search area.

geoBounds.description: The normalized geographic bounds of the search context.

chains.description: The chain metadata of the place.

dateClosed.description: The closure date of the place.

distance.description: The distance to the place in meters.

email.description: The primary contact email of the place.

fax.description: The fax number of the place.

features.description: The feature flags of the place.

display.description: The display string for the opening hours.

openNow.description: Whether the place is open right now.

regular.description: The regular opening-hour entries returned by Foursquare.

link.description: The Foursquare detail link of the place.

address.description: The street address of the place.

addressExtended.description: The extended address line of the place.

country.description: The country code or country name of the place.

crossStreet.description: The cross street of the place.

formattedAddress.description: The human-readable formatted address of the place.

locality.description: The locality or city of the place.

postcode.description: The postal code of the place.

region.description: The state or region of the place.

menu.description: The menu URL of the place.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the photo.

prefix.description: The URL prefix of the photo.

suffix.description: The URL suffix of the photo.

width.description: The maximum width of the photo.

height.description: The maximum height of the photo.

classifications.description: The photo classifications returned by Foursquare.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the tip.

lang.description: The language code of the tip.

url.description: The canonical URL of the tip.

agreeCount.description: The number of agreements on the tip.

disagreeCount.description: The number of disagreements on the tip.

popularity.description: The popularity score of the place.

price.description: The price tier of the place.

rating.description: The rating score of the place.

socialMedia.description: The social media metadata of the place.

tastes.description: The tastes associated with the place.

tel.description: The telephone number of the place.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the tip.

lang.description: The language code of the tip.

url.description: The canonical URL of the tip.

agreeCount.description: The number of agreements on the tip.

disagreeCount.description: The number of disagreements on the tip.

tips.description: The embedded tips of the place.

website.description: The website URL of the place.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Foursquare place search response.
